title: デビュー戦の後に・First Step

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I'm searching for the right words.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What can I say? How can I express these feelings?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The cheers of the fans, my nerves on edge, the
wind rushing by me... I'd never experienced any of
it before.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: As I was running, I prayed it would never end...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That's how much it filled my heart!
choice_data_list: I can see it had quite an effect on you.
I can see it had quite an effect on you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Indeed. My heart's still pounding!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I want to run more. I want to run in so many more
races!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Woo! Let's raise the sails and set off for the next
port, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oops!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, let me take a seat. What were you saying?
choice_data_list:
Before that, let's focus on getting you more
accustomed to running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Due to her unique circumstances, Fine Motion has
much less training than the other racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Potential alone isn't going to carry her through
races. I explain to her that we'll work on her
fundamentals and enter races based on how
training goes to steadily build more experience.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, you make some good points...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Understood! I'll build up my stamina until I can
run without my heart beating out of my chest!
choice_data_list:
I also want you to think about which races you'd
like to make your goal.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh? I could do that, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Even if we just stick to training, I'll be happy. As
long as I get to run. ♪
choice_data_list:
Having a clear objective will help you grow into
an even better runner.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll put some thought into it. While I'm busy
running, of course!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm so happy. ♪ I'm going to run the full
circumference of the world in these three years!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we begin Fine Motion's junior year by
focusing on her training and development.
